creator: bobf@mrp3.com
text:
the sysctl variable to adjust shutdown behavior is a very good one.

that way it could be controlled by the end user.  So then it's just a matter of deciding what the default behavior should be.

in any case, if the default is "leave it as-is" and the sysctl var is added, that would be perfect.  I'd assign it someplace (maybe in sysctl.conf?) and that would fix everything.
